common.searchPlaceholder: Search courses e.g. IST101 or English...
common.homeSubtitle: Share your course experiences to help others make better enrollment decisions.

about.title: About SUT Review
about.subtitle: A course review platform by SUT students, for SUT students.
about.originDesc: SUT Course Review was born from a common problem — students not knowing what to expect from GE courses. Is it hard? Is the workload heavy? Is the professor good? This information used to be scattered across GroupChats. This project centralizes reviews to make decision-making easier.
about.mission1Desc: Reviews from actual students, not generic data.
about.mission2Desc: Students helping students across years and majors.
about.mission3Desc: Helping you choose courses that actually fit you.
about.ctaText: Have suggestions or want to contribute?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Desc: When you log in with Google, we receive: name, email, and profile picture from Google OAuth. This is used to display your name in reviews and prevent duplicate reviews.
privacy.section2Item1: Display name in reviews (unless Anonymous is selected)
privacy.section2Item2: Validate 1 review per course per user
privacy.section3Desc: We do not sell, share, or forward your personal data to third parties. All data is stored in MongoDB Atlas on a secure Cloud.
privacy.section4Desc: We use Cookies for Session Authentication (NextAuth.js) only. No tracking or marketing cookies.
privacy.section5Desc: You can request to delete your personal data from our system at any time by contacting us via

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1Desc: By using SUT Course Review, you agree to these terms in full. If you disagree, please discontinue use.
terms.section2Desc: This platform is primarily for SUT students, faculty, and staff. A valid Google account is required for login.
terms.section3Item1: You must have actually taken the course before reviewing.
terms.section3Item2: No profanity, insults, or content that harms others.
terms.section3Item3: No unauthorized disclosure of others' personal information.
terms.section4Desc: We reserve the right to remove reviews that violate these rules without prior notice and may suspend repeat offenders.
terms.section5Desc: Reviews reflect the personal opinions of the authors and do not represent the official position of SUT. We are not responsible for the accuracy of review content.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Found a bug? Have a request? Send us a message.
contact.sendSuccess: Message sent! Thank you for your feedback.

courseDetail.noReviewsYet: No reviews for this course yet. Be the first to review!
courseDetail.shareExp: Share your experience to help others make better decisions

writeReviewPage.title: Write a Review
writeReviewPage.alreadyReviewed: You have already reviewed this course
writeReviewPage.tip3: What parts did the exam focus on?
writeReviewPage.warningDesc: Please use polite language and do not include personal information that may affect others. All reviews will be screened.
